subcodes.first_line: We make mention of Our handmaiden who hath believed in God, who hath soared in the atmosphere of My love, who hath quaffed the choice wine of My tender mercy, and who hath attained [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا نذکر امتی التی آمنت بالله و طارت فی هوآء حبی و شربت رحیق عنایتی و فازت
